source: DGA Platforms Code — Foundations → Elevation/Shadows (https://design.dga.gov.sa/guidelines/foundations/elevation), official page rendered and read 2026-06-16. Version label on page: الإصدار 1.0.
notes: Platforms Code defines 7 shadow effects (xs, sm, md, lg, xl, 2xl, 3xl). sm-xl are two-layer shadows; xs, 2xl, 3xl are single-layer.
All layers use the shadow color #101828 (rgb 16,24,40) at the per-layer opacity given.
Each layer maps to CSS box-shadow as: <x>px <y>px <blur>px <spread>px rgba(16,24,40,<opacity>).

VERIFY in the official Figma library: the 2xl row rendered its Y value ambiguously on the page (shown as '240'); 24 is used here as it sits consistently between xl (y20) and 3xl (y32). Also confirm the backdrop-blur level names.
Do not present these as official DGA compliance. Verified value extraction for implementation alignment only.

Shadows-shadow-2xl._verify: y rendered as '240' on source page; confirm 24 in Figma

backdrop_blur._verify: Source rendered level names ambiguously (sm, sm, lg, lg); blur values are clear. Confirm names in Figma.
